question: What is the home stadium of the team David Beckham last played for?

oracle_hops.claim: David Beckham's last professional team was Paris Saint-Germain.
Paris Saint-Germain plays home matches at Parc des Princes.

David Beckham last professional team.title: David Beckham
David Beckham last professional team.text: David Beckham returned to LA Galaxy and retired in 2013 after a short spell at Paris Saint-Germain.

Paris Saint-Germain home stadium.title: Paris Saint-Germain F.C.
Paris Saint-Germain home stadium.text: Paris Saint-Germain have played at the Parc des Princes since 1974.
